ddls:
CREATE TABLE "population_data" (
  "location_code" TEXT /* Code representing the location */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which the data is recorded */,
  "population_count" INTEGER /* Total population count */,
  "granularity_time" INTEGER /* Temporal granularity of the data */,
  "granularity_geo" INTEGER /* Geographical granularity of the data */,
  "border" INTEGER /* Border year for the data */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age group */,
  "sex" INTEGER /* Sex */,
  "yrwk" TEXT /* Year and week identifier */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week */,
  "x" INTEGER /* Unknown column 'x' */,
  "pop" INTEGER /* Total population */,
  "pr100000" REAL /* Population per 100,000 */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "date_of_publishing" TEXT /* Date when the data was published */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population per square kilometer */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_code", "date"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_season FOREIGN KEY ("season") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_granularity_time FOREIGN KEY ("granularity_time") REFERENCES time_granularity ("granularity_time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_age FOREIGN KEY ("age") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_sex FOREIGN KEY ("sex") REFERENCES sex_groups ("sex_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_granularity_geo FOREIGN KEY ("granularity_geo") REFERENCES geo_granularity ("granularity_geo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_code" TEXT /* Code representing the location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region to which the location belongs */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the location in square kilometers */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the location */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the location data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_granularity" (
  "granularity_time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each temporal granularity */,
  "granularity_time" TEXT /* Description of the temporal granularity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the temporal granularity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("granularity_time_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geo_granularity" (
  "granularity_geo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographical granularity */,
  "granularity_geo" TEXT /* Description of the geographical granularity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the geographical granularity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("granularity_geo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age" TEXT /* Description of the age group */,
  "age_range_min" INTEGER /* Minimum age in the age group */,
  "age_range_max" INTEGER /* Maximum age in the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sex_groups" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sex group */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Description of the sex group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the sex group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season" TEXT /* Description of the season */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_dates" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication event */,
  "date_of_publishing" TEXT /* Date when the data was published */,
  "location_code" TEXT /* Location code for which the data was published */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_dates_location_code FOREIGN KEY ("location_code") REFERENCES locations ("location_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population trend */,
  "location_code" TEXT /* Location code for the trend data */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for the trend data */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population for the year */,
  "population_growth" REAL /* Population growth rate */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., growth, decline) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_trends_location_code FOREIGN KEY ("location_code") REFERENCES locations ("location_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data import */,
  "location_code" TEXT /* Location code for the imported data */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was imported */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the imported data */,
  "import_type" TEXT /* Type of import (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "import_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the import */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_location_code FOREIGN KEY ("location_code") REFERENCES locations ("location_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data export */,
  "location_code" TEXT /* Location code for the exported data */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was exported */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the exported data */,
  "export_type" TEXT /* Type of export (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "export_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the export */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_location_code FOREIGN KEY ("location_code") REFERENCES locations ("location_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "location_code" TEXT /* Location code for the accessed data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_location_code FOREIGN KEY ("location_code") REFERENCES locations ("location_code")
)
